form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a 0.3 len at this track March 28 over 905m defeating Charlienite carrying 57kg at $7.90. Previously second-up settled back and ran on when 6th of 10 at this track on June 28 over 905m, 15 len behind Life Is Daily carrying 52.5kg at $29.10. One of the top chances.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Not raced for 51 days. Last start 2nd in a small field at this track on February 18 over 905m, 2.25 len behind T Rex Union with 55.5kg at $2.60.
